name: SURGE
tagline: Drop body fat and build real strength in 6 weeks.
styleSignature: Dramatic cinematic athletic photography, gritty high-contrast dark gym, hard volt-lime (#c8f135) rim light and electric edge glow against a near-black charcoal (#0c0d0f) and graphite (#1a1d21) environment, sweat sheen and chalk dust suspended in the air, motion blur and flying sparks, raw muscular power and explosive effort, deep shadows with a single bright accent light, shallow depth of field, hyper-detailed, professional sports key art. No text, no words, no letters.
styleSignatureWhiteBg: Bold premium 3D athletic render, clean even studio lighting with a soft volt-lime (#c8f135) glow, glossy charcoal (#1a1d21) and graphite material with hard electric-lime edge light, crisp confident sport-equipment style, single centered isolated subject. Solid pure pure-white seamless studio background, brightly lit, no dark environment, no scenery, no cast shadow, no reflection on the background. No text, no words, no letters.
_signatureNote: Use styleSignature for full scenes/heroes/athlete art (dark charcoal). Use styleSignatureWhiteBg for any asset keyed out to transparent (logo, mark, icons, chrome, host cutout, seal). The dark signature's near-black background fights cutouts. Always prepend the chosen signature to the subjectPrompt. Single-hue accent only — volt-lime; never blend volt into a second hue.
